chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP No.D-4769 of 2021 Date Order with signature of Judge(s) 1. For hearing of CMA No.19514/2021. 2. For hearing of main case. 16.08.2021 Mr. Ahmed Ali Hussain, advocate and Syed Zaeem Hyder, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Kafeel Ahmed Abbasi, Deputy Attorney General and Mr. Hussain Bohra, Assistant Attorney General. ********** Mr. Muhammad Rashid Arfi, advocate undertakes to file Vakalatnama on behalf of the respondent No.2 to 4. Learned counsel for the petitioner submits that this petition can be disposed of by directing the Member Customs FBR, before whom the appeal is pending. With the consent of learned counsel for the respondents No.2 to 4 we deem it appropriate to dispose of this petition with directions to the Member Customs FBR, that the appeal of petitioner be heard and decided in accordance with law in 60 days’ time. The fate of the bank guarantee shall be subject to the outcome of the decision of the respondent No.1 and whosoever is beneficiary, the amount shall be released by the Nazir of this court. Till the decision by the respondent No.1, no coercive action shall be taken against the petitioner. Petition alongwtih pending application(s) stands disposed of accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE Khuhro/PA
